subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-23 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: All the inhabitants of this city are immersed in this world, and its buildings resemble the hives of bees
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع این اهالی غرق دنیا هستند و عمارات شهر مثل خانه‌های زنبور و مردم متصل مشغول ساختن
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @symbolism
